title: Boston → The West → Boston
subtitle: A Tesla Model Y National-Parks Field Guide

stages.name: Boston to the Black Hills
stages.notes: Charging here is effortless — just top off in any I-90 town. Sage Creek Campground is free, first-come, and bison wander through; worth the camp night.

days_list.route: Boston → Cleveland, OH — long highway day, pure transit
Cuyahoga Valley NP — free park; Brandywine Falls, Ledges Trail
Cleveland → Chicago area — transit day
Chicago → Sioux Falls, SD — big drive, break the plains
Sioux Falls → Badlands NP — arrive afternoon, sunset over spires
Badlands hiking — Notch, Castle, Door & Window trails
Black Hills — Mt. Rushmore, Wind Cave NP (free), Black Elk Peak
Buffer / explore — Custer State Park wildlife loop, Needles Hwy
Black Hills → West Yellowstone — long scenic drive west
Yellowstone (3 days) — Mt. Washburn, Fairy Falls, Lamar Valley, geyser basins
days_list.charge: Supercharger in West Yellowstone overnight; Level 2 at Canyon/Old Faithful while hiking
days_list.sleep: West Yellowstone hotel (or grab an in-park site early for 1 camp night)

days_list.route: Yellowstone → Grand Teton — short drive south
Grand Teton (2 days) — Cascade Canyon, Jenny Lake, Delta Lake
days_list.charge: Jackson Supercharger; Level 2 at Signal Mtn / Colter Bay

days_list.route: Reposition south — toward Salt Lake City; resupply, laundry

stages.name: Colorado Rockies
stages.notes: Trail Ridge Road and the San Juan passes are big climbs — leave town at 90–100% and let regen recover charge on the way down. This is your most flexible stretch: add or trim a San Juan day if you're running ahead or behind.

days_list.route: SLC → Rocky Mountain NP — drive to Estes Park gateway
Rocky Mountain NP (2 days) — Bear Lake, Emerald Lake, Sky Pond, Trail Ridge Rd (>12,000 ft)
days_list.charge: Estes Park — full before Trail Ridge climb

days_list.route: South to the San Juans — drive toward Durango/Ouray
San Juans (2 days) — Ouray, Silverton, alpine hikes ("Switzerland of America")
Colorado → Moab — drive to red-rock country
Arches & Canyonlands — Delicate Arch (sunrise), Devils Garden, Mesa Arch, Island in the Sky
Moab → Capitol Reef — scenic Hwy 24 west
days_list.charge: Top off in Moab; plan the gap

days_list.route: Capitol Reef → Bryce — uncrowded gem, then Bryce
Bryce Canyon — Navajo / Queens Garden combo loop
Zion (2 days) — The Narrows, Angels Landing (lottery!), Observation Pt
Zion → Las Vegas → Nevada interior — I-15 to Vegas (last dense hub), then US-95 north
Nevada → Eastern Sierra (US-395) — up through Tonopah, cut to 395 toward Bishop/Mammoth
days_list.sleep: Bishop or Mammoth hotel (or 🏕 NF camp)

days_list.route: Sierra → Sequoia/Kings Canyon — drive in to the big trees
Sequoia & Kings Canyon (2 days) — General Sherman, Moro Rock, Cedar Grove
→ Yosemite — north; plan to arrive before 8 am tomorrow
Yosemite (3 days) — Mist Trail, Yosemite Falls, Cathedral Lakes; Half Dome if lottery hits
days_list.charge: Mariposa / Groveland — charge in gateway, day-trip in

stages.name: California Coast & Oregon
stages.notes: Your easiest charging stretch — enjoy it before the long eastward haul. Use a buffer night here if you're behind; the coast and Bend both reward an extra day.

days_list.route: Yosemite → SF → Big Sur — Hwy 1, the coast, redwoods begin
North to Redwood NP — coast redwoods, tide pools, sea stacks
→ Crater Lake NP, OR — deep-blue caldera, rim drive
Bend, OR (Cascades base) — Smith Rock, Three Sisters, lava country
Columbia Gorge & Mt. Hood — Multnomah Falls, gorge waterfalls
Stage into eastern Oregon — begin the long haul east; charge full
days_list.charge: Bend / Ontario — fill before the gap

days_list.route: Eastern OR → I-90 (Coeur d'Alene, ID) — cross the remote part, then hit the interstate spine
days_list.charge: Plan the eastern-OR gap in ABRP → Coeur d'Alene

days_list.route: → Missoula, MT — comfortable interstate driving
Missoula → Kalispell — ~114 mi, one easy hop
Glacier NP (2 days) — Going-to-the-Sun Rd, Highline, Grinnell Glacier, Avalanche Lake
days_list.charge: Charge FULL in Kalispell; day-trip in — no fast charging in park

days_list.route: Buffer / Two Medicine / Many Glacier — hold loose for weather or a place you love
Glacier → east across MT — optional: Theodore Roosevelt NP, ND (uncrowded)
ND → MN → … → Boston — multi-day interstate run home
